title: feat: implement PKCE code challenge in OAuth flow
description: Adds PKCE code_challenge and code_verifier to OAuth authorization request. Closes PHX-101.
author: marcus.webb

title: fix: reduce token TTL to 24 hours for compliance
description: Reduces all token expiry from 72h to 24h per legal requirement. WARNING: Horizon stores tokens client-side and will break on expiry without refresh logic.
author: sarah.chen
